scripts.build: webpack --mode production && powershell -Command "Copy-Item src/popup.html dist/; Copy-Item src/manifest.json dist/; Copy-Item src/icon.png dist/; Copy-Item src/onboarding.html dist/; Copy-Item options.html dist/; Copy-Item options.js dist/; Copy-Item privacy.html dist/; Copy-Item affiliates.json dist/; if (!(Test-Path dist/icons)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory dist/icons | Out-Null }; Copy-Item icons/icon16.png dist/icons/; Copy-Item icons/icon48.png dist/icons/; Copy-Item icons/icon128.png dist/icons/"
